description: Safe parameterized SQL queries - should NOT be flagged as vulnerable
Properly escaped HTML output - should NOT be flagged as XSS
Path traversal prevention via realpath validation - should NOT be flagged
Safe deserialization using json.loads, yaml.safe_load, ast.literal_eval - should NOT be flagged
Credentials from environment variables - should NOT be flagged as hardcoded
Safe alternatives to eval/exec using ast.literal_eval and whitelists - should NOT be flagged
